generated_oml:
// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 model capturing functional and logical topology of the twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSETool
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture description with its Automaton extension for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSETool
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block-diagram model embodying analytical and numerical behavior executed during simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulatorTool
]

instance CodeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Generated C++ or Java code linked back to SysML IBDs via model-to-code transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGeneratorTool
]

instance SemanticMappingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Shared model library and semantic mapping aligning component interfaces and connectors across SysML, MontiArc, and AADL schemas"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo IntegrationTool
]

instance ExportPipelineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automated export pipeline managing model versioning and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ExportPipelineTool
]

// C10: Data
instance SysMLModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing SysML v1.7 model artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSETool
]

instance MontiArcModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing MontiArc automaton models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSETool
]

instance SimulinkModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing Simulink block-diagram models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulatorTool
]

instance CodeModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing generated C++/Java code models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGeneratorTool
]

instance SemanticMappingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing shared model library and semantic mapping framework"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo IntegrationTool
]

instance ExportPipelineData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing automated export pipeline artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ExportPipelineTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MBSETool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool supporting SysML and MontiArc modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingService
]

instance SimulatorTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink engine used for simulation of block-diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CodeGeneratorTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Code generation engine producing C++/Java code from models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

instance IntegrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic mapping framework aligning component interfaces across SysML, MontiArc, and AADL schemas"
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegrationService
]

instance ExportPipelineTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated export pipeline for model versioning and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables ExportService
]

// C6: Services
instance ModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that manages modeling artifacts and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes Simulink models to generate time-domain response data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance CodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating C++/Java code and linking back to IBDs"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance IntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that maps interfaces and connectors across different models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance ExportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs automated export of model updates for consistency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that validates consistency through simulation and model-based testing"
]

instance SynchronizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that synchronizes the twin as models are refined and updates generated code and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "In the Digital Twin context discussed, the lifecycle is organized into four abstraction layers: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. Each stage is represented with MBSE tools such as SysML for requirements and functional diagramming, ADLs (ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) for logical and component‑connector perspectives, and detailed product models at the final layer. Transition between stages is managed by converting textual requirements into diagrammatic functional architecture, then into logical architecture that captures component interconnections, and finally into product‑level models that can be instantiated or simulated. This staged governance allows systematic change management and traceability across the Digital Twin’s development phases."
]
